Bash(cat > "C:/Users/user/.antigravity/KDSAIDEV HUB/.env.example" << 'EOF'
# ── Server ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PORT=3000
NODE_ENV=production

# ── MongoDB ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
DB_HOST=localhost
DB_PORT=27017
DB_NAME=swagclaw
DB_USER=
DB_PASSWORD=

# ── JWT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
JWT_SECRET=change-this-to-a-long-random-string
JWT_EXPIRY=24h

# ── External API ──────────────────────────────────────────────
API_BASE_URL=https://api.example.com
API_KEY=

# ── Discord \(GravityClaw Bot\) ─────────────────────────────────
# Get these from https://discord.com/developers/applications
DISCORD_TOKEN=
DISCORD_CLIENT_ID=
DISCORD_GUILD_ID=
DISCORD_CHANNEL_ID=

# ── OpenClaw ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
OPENCLAW_API=http://localhost:8080
EOF)

Bash(ls "C:/Users/user/.antigravity/KDSAIDEV HUB/src/services/" && cat "C:/Users/user/.openclaw/openclaw.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('server',d.get\('api',{}\)\), indent=2\)\)" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\user\\.antigravity\\KDSAIDEV HUB" && node -e "
require\('dotenv'\).config\(\);
const vars = {
  PORT: process.env.PORT,
  NODE_ENV: process.env.NODE_ENV,
  SUPABASE_URL: process.env.SUPABASE_URL ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  SUPABASE_KEY: process.env.SUPABASE_KEY ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  JWT_SECRET: process.env.JWT_SECRET && process.env.JWT_SECRET !== 'change-this-to-a-long-random-string' ? '✓ SET' : '⚠ DEFAULT/MISSING',
  DISCORD_TOKEN: process.env.DISCORD_TOKEN ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  DISCORD_GUILD_ID: process.env.DISCORD_GUILD_ID ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  DISCORD_CHANNEL_ID: process.env.DISCORD_CHANNEL_ID ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL: process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  OPENAI_API_KEY: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  OPENROUTER_API_KEY: process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  ELEVENLABS_API_KEY: process.env.ELEVENLABS_API_KEY ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  DEEPGRAM_API_KEY: process.env.DEEPGRAM_API_KEY ? '✓ SET' : '✗ MISSING',
  API_BASE_URL: process.env.API_BASE_URL,
};
console.log\(JSON.stringify\(vars, null, 2\)\);
" 2>&1)

  DISCORD_GUILD_ID:        process.env.DISCORD_GUILD_ID   ? '✓' : '✗ MISSING',
  DISCORD_CHANNEL_ID:      process.env.DISCORD_CHANNEL_ID ? '✓' : '✗ MISSING',
  DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL:     process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL? '✓' : '✗ MISSING',
  DISCORD_ADMIN_ID:        process.env.DISCORD_ADMIN_ID   ? '✓' : '✗ MISSING',

  GOOGLE_API_KEY:          process.env.GOOGLE_API_KEY     ? '✓' : '✗ MISSING',
  OPENROUTER_API_KEY:      process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY ? '✓' : '✗ MISSING',
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:       process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY  ? '✓' : '✗ MISSING',
  OPENAI_API_KEY:          process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY     ? '✓' : '✗ MISSING',
  ELEVENLABS_API_KEY:      process.env.ELEVENLABS_API_KEY ? '✓' : '✗ MISSING',
